title: Incorrect boolean comparison in conditional rendering
symptom: The sidebar pop-up does not display even when the variable 'show_admin_menu' is set to true. The formula incorrectly evaluates to false.
applies_when: Using a boolean variable for conditional rendering
not_this_if: The condition is applied incorrectly in the settings
root_cause: The issue arises from comparing a boolean value to a string. In WeWeb, using quotation marks around 'true' makes it a string, which does not match the boolean true, leading to incorrect evaluations.
fix_steps: Remove the quotation marks around 'true' in the conditional formula
Ensure the comparison is made directly with the boolean value true
agent_instruction: Change the comparison to use the boolean true without quotation marks.
